topic: Creating and Managing Earning and Deduction Heads
summary: This topic explains how to create new earning or deduction heads within the system, which can then be utilized in salary templates or during monthly salary adjustments.
steps: Navigate to Settings > HRM Setup > Payroll Master.
Select either 'Earning Heads' or 'Deduction Heads' based on your requirement.
To enable an existing predefined head (e.g., HRA, Medical Allowance), tick the checkbox next to it and click 'Save'.
To create a completely new head, click 'Add New'.
Enter the 'Name' of the new earning or deduction head.
business_rules: Always click 'Save' after making any changes or adding new heads to ensure they are stored in the system.
important_notes: Heads created or enabled here will become available for selection and use in salary templates and during monthly salary adjustments.
questions: How do I add a new allowance type to our payroll system?
Where can I create a custom deduction head for employee salaries?
What is the difference between Earning Heads and Deduction Heads in Payroll Master?
